title: centaurea scillae
intro: Centaurea scillae, also known as Squill or Scilla, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asparagaceae family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Centaurea scillae include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs are often dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to treat various health conditions.
